entities.name: WATER HYACINTH
entities.description: A dreadful invasive species that spreads and forms vast floating mats in Lake Victoria

entities.name: LAKE VICTORIA
entities.description: The body of water where water hyacinth infestation is monitored

entities.name: POLSAR
entities.description: Polarimetric Synthetic Aperture Radar used to assess the temporal variability of water hyacinth

entities.name: OPTIMIZATION OF POWER DIFFERENCE
entities.description: A change detection technique (OPDiff) used to separate water hyacinth from clear water

entities.name: SENTINEL-1 IW SLC
entities.description: The satellite data source used for applying the OPDiff change detection technique

entities.name: MINIMUM EIGENVALUES
entities.description: The mathematical criteria used by the detector to separate water hyacinth from clear water

entities.name: UNPOLARIZED SCATTERING
entities.description: The scattering contribution selected to separate water hyacinth from clear water

entities.name: TEMPORAL VARIABILITY
entities.description: The monthly and annual trends of water hyacinth amounts

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of water hyacinth spreading and forming mats in Lake Victoria
